- Additional tests guard hardcoded strings and localization drift.

## Tests and Tooling

New or expanded coverage includes:

- Gamepad mapping and input behavior.
- Per-character keybinds and keybind migration.
- Bug report UI/server/database behavior.
- Quest tracker and tutorial state machines.
- Chat window geometry parsing/clamping.
- Dropdown navigation helpers.
- World-map terrain painter and idle prewarm equivalence.
- Pet pathfinding and pet combat-regeneration behavior.
- Selection ring terrain draping.
- Tab targeting behavior.
- Quest item fallback behavior.
- Unequip item flow and skin-load retry behavior.
- Travel Form movement and diagnostics coverage.
- Low-quality need/greed loot-roll behavior.

New/updated screenshot and verification harnesses include ability icons, browser effects, chatbox resize, click marker, entity flicker, Escape run behavior, gamepad, keybinds, map/quest/tutorial, pet follow, selection ring, tab target, takeover, and unequip flows.

## Upgrade Notes

- This release adds native iOS/Android project trees and generated image assets, so repository checkout size and diff size are substantially larger than previous releases.
- Capacitor/native app builds require the native toolchains outside the normal web Docker build path.
- The web Docker build remains valid for server deployment.
- The release adds admin bug-report and movement-diagnostic fields; admin consumers should tolerate the expanded payload shape.
- Travel Form diagnostics are intentionally present to help inspect any future live state mismatch where the client appears shifted but server speed reports normal movement.

## Validation

Validated locally on latest `release/v0.13.0` at `58507cf6`:

- `docker build -t world-of-claudecraft:release-v0.13.0-local .` - passed.

The Docker build completed the client build and server build successfully. Existing Vite warnings were present for Meta Pixel noscript HTML parsing, cursor asset resolution, admin i18n dynamic imports, and large chunk size.

## Size

Compared with v0.12.0:

- **151 commits**
- **429 files changed**
- **17,397 additions / 424 deletions**

patches.name: v0.12.0
patches.body:
# World of ClaudeCraft - v0.12.0 Release Notes

  **Release:** v0.12.0
  **Date:** 2026-06-22
  **Previous release:** v0.11.0

  v0.12.0 is a major raid, combat-systems, UI, account, security, and polish release
  with **173 commits** since v0.11.0. It ships the first 10-player raid encounter,
  Nythraxis, expands raid/group infrastructure, adds need-greed loot rolls, improves
  class gear flexibility, introduces performance overlay tooling, adds account
  management, strengthens moderation controls, and completes the release-tier
  localization pass.

  ## Highlights

  - **Nythraxis raid encounter**: a 10-player raid boss with a full attunement chain,
  voice lines, raid lockouts, Soul Rend, Deathless Rage, wardstones, add waves, Brother
  Aldric transition dialogue, and raid-specific mechanics.
  - **Final Nythraxis quest**: Scourge's End now completes the storyline after killing
  Nythraxis, with Brother Aldric turn-in support inside and outside the dungeon.
  - **Raid party support**: parties can convert to raids, manage raid groups, and enter
  raid-only content.
  - **Need-greed loot rolls**: dungeon and raid loot can now use timed need-greed
  rolls, including pass handling and fallback corpse claiming.
  - **Class and gear flexibility**: equipment proficiency rules were broadened to
  support hybrid class gearing and broader armor/weapon access.
  - **Performance overlay**: a customizable, draggable overlay adds FPS, frame time,
  lows, ping, renderer stats, memory, hitches, entity counts, and a full Options >
  Performance panel.
  - **Account portal**: the homepage now has account management, persistent login,
  email/password management, character summaries, and wallet management entry points.
  - **Security and moderation**: IP blocking management was added, bot detection was
  moved behind a private/stubbed server contract, and logout now revokes tokens.
  - **Mobile and UI polish**: iOS HUD scrolling, bag scroll preservation, keybind
  layout, character select, trade money inputs, market counts, guild nameplates, pet
  nameplates, and character stat tooltips all received targeted improvements.
  - **Release-tier localization**: the full 14-locale release gate is green with
  `pending=0`.

  ## Nythraxis Raid

  - Added the Nythraxis raid encounter in the Abandoned Crypt raid arena.
  - Nythraxis is configured as a level-20 undead elite boss with roughly **51,239 HP**.
  - The boss arena is **raid-only**, requires the Nythraxis attunement, and uses a raid
  lockout.
  - Added Nythraxis-specific haunting voice lines and dungeon boss music.

  ## Quest Chain

  - Added **Scourge's End**, the final quest after the Nythraxis attunement chain.
  - The quest requires killing Nythraxis.
  - Brother Aldric can accept the turn-in both in Thornpeak Heights and inside the raid
  after the boss dies.
  - The implementation ensures the quest cannot be handed in twice through the two
  Aldric locations.
  - Brother Aldric's raid presence is now a dynamic NPC instead of a hostile mob-style
  workaround.

  ## Groups, Loot, and Combat Systems

  - Added raid-party support and raid-specific social UI.
  - Added need-greed loot rolls with timeout/pass behavior.
  - All-pass loot remains claimable from the corpse.
  - Added tests around need-greed roll coverage and localization.
  - Broadened class equipment proficiencies:
    - Shamans, Warriors, and Paladins can use mail and lower.
    - Druids, Rogues, and Hunters can use leather and lower.
    - Priests, Warlocks, and Mages remain cloth users.
    - Hybrid and weapon access rules were widened for practical class builds.
  - Added or refined combat behavior around boss pets, pet taunts, dead targets, Soul
  Rend targeting, and raid threat.
  - Right-click interaction no longer incorrectly aggros mobs at range.
  - Druid bear, Paladin Consecration, and Nythraxis raid combat behavior were tuned
  through simulation.

  ## Classes and Character UX

  - Druids now get per-form action bars for shapeshift forms, with auto-populated form
  kits.
  - The spellbook Reset Bar button is shown only for Druids.
  - Character stat cells now show class-aware hover/long-press tooltips.
  - Stat tooltips explain primary stats, derived effects, armor reduction, attack
  power, crit, dodge, mana, health, and class relevance.
  - Character select was reworked so the showcase aligns with the wallet line and gives
  the preview/stats more room.
  - Fresh sessions now default to Ultra graphics.

  ## UI, Market, and Controls

  - Added gold/silver/copper coin glyphs to trade and market money inputs.
  - Trade money inputs now accept gold/silver/copper denominations instead of raw
  copper.
  - Market listing counts now update correctly in busy markets.
  - Sellers now reliably see their own listings.
  - Bag scroll position is preserved when using items.
  - iOS HUD windows can scroll again in Bag and Market views.
  - Key Bindings now use a cleaner two-column desktop layout with uniform buttons and
  dividers.
  - Guild names now render under player nameplates.
  - Friendly player pets now render with friendly nameplate coloring and correct
  selection-ring behavior.
  - Ambient critters thin out naturally across the Eastbrook-to-Mirefen causeway
  transition.

  ## Performance Overlay

  - Added a new customizable performance overlay with:
    - FPS
    - frame time
    - 1% and 0.1% lows
    - ping and jitter
    - snapshot rate
    - connection state
    - draw calls
    - triangles
    - geometries
    - textures
    - shader programs
    - render scale
    - GPU label
    - memory
    - hitches
    - entity count
  - Overlay position can be dragged and persisted.
  - Options > Performance now has metric groups, presets, color themes, custom
  foreground/background colors, opacity, font scale, and threshold controls.
  - Renderer perf stats now expose geometry count.
  - Added pure model/config/sampler/painter modules and screenshot harnesses for
  regression coverage.

  ## Account, Wallet, and Player Cards

  - Added a homepage account portal with persistent login.
  - Added account email, password change, logout, deactivate, and wallet management
  surfaces.
  - Logout now revokes the session token.
  - Wallet holder-tier names and flavor text were translated across locales.
  - Player-card and holder-tier responsive behavior received additional fixes and
  review cleanup.

  ## Security, Moderation, and Operations

  - Added IP blocking management in admin tools.
  - Added server-side IP block persistence and kicking behavior.
  - Refactored bot detection behind a private/server-side contract with a public stub
  in this repo.
  - Removed public behavioral bot-detection implementation files from the open-source
  surface.
  - Added legal policy pages:
    - Terms and Conditions
    - Privacy Policy
  - Added a `/play` landing route.
  - Added Meta Pixel tracking.
  - Updated README and deployment docs for the current public-facing project shape.
  - `npm audit --audit-level=moderate` reports `found 0 vulnerabilities`.

  ## Audio and World Presentation

  - Added Nythraxis raid music.
  - Added Nythraxis and Brother Aldric raid voice assets.
  - Added remaining unvoiced NPC quest and greeting voice files.
  - Polished Nythraxis combat audio so boss dialogue is clear and non-essential combat
  barks are suppressed.
  - Added dungeon boss fight audio asset.

  ## Internationalization

  - Filled all v0.12.0 pending translations across every supported locale.
  - Added and translated performance overlay strings.
  - Added and translated character stat tooltip strings.
  - Added and translated raid, holder-tier, account, and Nythraxis dungeon strings.
  - Regenerated resolved i18n artifacts, status summary, and hash baseline.
  - Release-tier localization now passes with `pending=0`.
  - Added guidance to regenerate generated i18n artifacts instead of hand-merging them.

  ## Tests and Tooling

  - Added `scripts/nythraxis_matrix.ts` for future Nythraxis and class-balance
  simulation work.
  - Added extensive Nythraxis raid tests covering mechanics, targeting, phase timing,
  wardstones, adds, CC immunity, pets, lockouts, and dialogue.
  - Added Nythraxis final quest tests and Brother Aldric dynamic NPC tests.
  - Added performance overlay unit tests and screenshot harnesses.
  - Added account portal, account server, IP block, pet reaction, combat SFX, stat
  tooltip, mob combat, music, and voice-event coverage.
  - Added iOS HUD scroll verification harness.
  - Added visual harnesses for market listing counts, bag scrolling, pet nameplates,
  stat tooltips, and trade money inputs.
  - Added architecture/guidance tests around module structure.

  ## Upgrade Notes

  - `package.json` still reports `0.10.0`; release metadata should carry the public
  `v0.12.0` version unless the package version is bumped before publishing.
  - Nythraxis requires a raid group again. Solo/non-raid entry is intentionally blocked
  outside local playtest changes.
  - Nythraxis requires `q_nythraxis_bound_guardian` attunement.
  - The release adds more static audio under `public/audio/voice/` plus `public/audio/
  dungeon-boss-fight.mp3`; deployment targets should expect a larger static asset
  footprint.
  - The public bot-detector implementation was removed from this repo and replaced by a
  private/stub contract.
  - Generated i18n artifacts are part of the release gate. Run `npm run i18n:gen` or
  `npm test` before direct Vitest work in a fresh checkout.

  ## Validation

  Validated locally on `release/v0.12.0` at `252cdd13`:

  - `npm audit --audit-level=moderate` - passed, `found 0 vulnerabilities`.
  - `I18N_RELEASE_TIER=1 npm test` - passed, 279 files / 2864 tests.
  - `npx tsc --noEmit` - passed.
  - `npm run build:env` - passed.
  - `npm run build:server` - passed.
  - `npm run build` - passed with existing Vite warnings.
  - GitHub PR #814:
    - PR gate - success.
    - Release gate - success.

patches.name: v0.11.0
patches.body:
# World of ClaudeCraft - v0.11.0 Release Notes

**Release:** v0.11.0
**Date:** 2026-06-21
**Previous release:** v0.10.0

v0.11.0 is a security, localization, wallet, performance, and polish release with
**80 commits** since the public v0.10.0 tag. It removes the vulnerable third-party
wallet connector stack, adds a smaller injected Solana wallet-linking path,
introduces `$WOC` holder flair and shareable player cards, completes a major
hardcoded-string localization sweep, improves graphics budgets and telemetry,
and lands several game-feel fixes across movement, audio, market browsing, and
combat.

## Highlights

- **Wallet security cleanup**: the Reown/AppKit wallet SDK stack was removed and
  replaced with a narrow injected Solana wallet flow for challenge signing.
- **Zero moderate-or-higher npm audit findings**: the latest release branch audit
  reports `found 0 vulnerabilities`.
- **$WOC holder flair and player cards**: linked wallets can show exact `$WOC`
  balance, holder-tier badges, shareable player cards, and referral-friendly
  card URLs.
- **Full hardcoded-string localization sweep**: UI, sim, server, admin, and
  generated locale outputs were hardened so player-facing text continues to pass
  release-tier localization gates.
- **In-game language switching**: players can switch language from the Options
  menu without leaving the game.
- **Graphics budgets and telemetry**: adaptive render budgets, low graphics
  profile tuning, telemetry export, and performance reporting tools were added.
- **Market browsing improvements**: search, filters, filtered counts, styled
  filter menus, and pagination make listings beyond the wire cap reachable.
- **Game-feel fixes**: Druid Travel Form and Dash now provide real movement
  speed, hill descent stays grounded, final DoT ticks apply, target portraits are
  sharper, and footstep audio no longer produces a metallic jingle.

## Wallet Security & `$WOC`

- The release removes `@reown/appkit`, `@reown/appkit-adapter-solana`,
  `@solana/web3.js`, and the associated browser polyfill path from the wallet
  client dependency surface.
- Wallet linking now uses injected Solana browser wallets directly. The flow is
  intentionally narrow: detect a provider, connect, sign the server challenge,
  and send the signature back for account linking.
- The wallet UI is enabled by default and can be disabled with
  `VITE_WALLET_DISABLED=1`.
- `$WOC` balance reads now go through the server proxy so RPC keys do not ship to
  the browser.
- Wallet UX was refined around Wallet Standard behavior, late provider injection,
  signature encoding, disconnect/account-change events, and wallet-help text
  alignment.
- Third-party license notices were added for the removed wallet-connect stack so
  the repository keeps the historical licensing trail clear.

## Holder Flair & Player Cards

- `$WOC` holder tiers now appear in inspect/profile surfaces and are backed by a
  shared holder-tier model.
- Shareable player cards were added for holder flair, including server rendering,
  player-card persistence, and card sharing helpers.
- Card image handling was tightened so hosted uploads stay smaller and dev card
  images continue to use the dev origin.
- The player-card layout was polished with the swapped brand mark, holder badge,
  exact balance support, and quality-pass test coverage.
- New server endpoints and database helpers cover wallet links, player cards,
  provider usage, and `$WOC` balance lookups.

## Internationalization

- A broad hardcoded-string sweep localizes player-facing UI, sim, and server text
  across the supported locale set.
- Release-tier localization output was completed and hardened so pending strings
  do not ship in the generated status registry.
- The translation workflow docs and subdirectory agent docs were aligned with the
  current i18n system.
- `Intl.PluralRules` cardinal pluralization was added through `tPlural`, with
  whole-catalog completeness and CLDR plural guard tests.
- The in-game language picker was added under Options > Interface and then
  hardened around re-enable behavior and focus restoration.
- Locale correctness fixes include Nythraxis diacritic repair, stale Druid
  Wolf-Form translations, Korean compass leakage, and additional audit-quality
  fixes across locale files.

## Graphics, Performance & Rendering

- Adaptive graphics budgets and telemetry were added, including render-budget
  tests and reporting utilities.
- The low graphics profile was finalized with capped cadence handling, foliage
  lean adjustments, and preserved high-tier graphics headroom.
- Telemetry ingestion and export were bounded so performance reporting stays
  useful without becoming an unbounded server sink.
- Renderer-focused performance traces replace broader net tracing for the dev
  performance branch.
- Target-frame portraits were polished for fill, HiDPI crispness, and layout
  overlap.
- Unit portrait helpers and painters were added for clearer UI portrait rendering.
- A new Chicken Cow model asset and generation script were added to the media
  asset set.

## Market, UI & Controls

- World Market browsing now supports search so listings beyond the wire cap can
  be found.
- Market filters, filtered counts, styled filter menus, and pagination make the
  browse experience more predictable.
- Market localization gates were satisfied and the catalog locale shape was
  aligned.
- Key Bindings now use a wider horizontal layout.
- HUD chrome localization coverage expanded alongside new UI catalog entries.
- Rest indicators, clocks, coordinates, compass, XP bar, minimap zoom, meters,
  chat timestamps, and cast bars received small polish and localization updates.

## Classes, Movement & Combat Fixes

- Druid Travel Form is now a real shapeshift with working movement speed.
- Druid Dash and Travel Form movement bonuses were corrected and covered by
  tests.
- Players now walk down slopes instead of detaching mid-hill.
- Final damage-over-time ticks now apply correctly at the end of a DoT window.
- Fleeing mobs no longer evade-reset inappropriately while trying to escape.
- Rare quest respawns were shortened to reduce waiting around quest objectives.
- Aldric's Fallen Star was retired from the release branch after the associated
  storyline setup moved out of scope.

## Audio

- Footstep sounds are now off by default with a player-facing toggle.
- Footstep playback was fixed so repeated footsteps no longer comb-filter into a
  metallic jingle.
- Screenshot and spectrogram harness scripts were added for footstep-toggle and
  footstep-walk verification.
- SFX settings and tests were updated around the new toggle behavior.

## Security, Server & Operations

- Dependency audit now passes with zero moderate-or-higher findings on the
  release branch.
- Server-side wallet linking, wallet metadata, `$WOC` balance reads, provider
  usage tracking, and player-card rendering are covered by new tests.
- Server HTTP utilities, rate limiting, admin database helpers, Turnstile paths,
  realm behavior, and database interfaces received targeted hardening and test
  coverage.
- Docker, Compose, deployment docs, and `.env.example` were updated to remove
  Reown project-id wiring and document the new wallet-disable flag.
- The release continues to keep RPC keys server-side for `$WOC` balance reads.

## Tests & Tooling

- New wallet coverage includes browser provider detection, late provider
  injection, signature object handling, wallet server linking, and `$WOC` balance
  proxy behavior.
- Player-card tests cover database behavior, server rendering, sharing, and
  holder broadcast behavior.
- Performance tests cover render budgets, perf reporting, and perf reporter
  behavior.
- Localization tests cover completeness, extra tables, hardcoded sweep fixes,
  server localization, and HUD chrome keys.
- New utility scripts cover market search screenshots, wallet E2E, player-card
  E2E, keybind layout screenshots, language-switch screenshots, target-frame
  visuals, dash speed charts, and footstep audio verification.

## Upgrade Notes

- The browser wallet integration no longer uses a Reown project id. Remove
  `VITE_REOWN_PROJECT_ID` from deployment configuration if it is still present.
- Use `VITE_WALLET_DISABLED=1` to hide wallet UI in environments where wallet
  linking should be disabled.
- Wallet linking now depends on an injected Solana wallet provider such as a
  browser extension or compatible wallet browser. It does not include Reown's
  cross-wallet modal, QR routing, embedded wallets, or broad multi-chain
  onboarding surface.
- `$WOC` balance lookup requires the server-side RPC configuration used by the
  wallet balance proxy. RPC keys should stay server-side.
- Release localization still depends on generated i18n artifacts. Use `npm test`
  or `npm run i18n:gen` before running direct `vitest` commands in a fresh
  checkout.
- `package.json` remains at `0.10.0` in this branch; tag/release metadata should
  carry the public v0.11.0 version unless the package version is bumped before
  publishing.

## Validation

Run locally from a clean detached worktree at `origin/release/v0.11.0`
(`a66f9ba4`):

- `npm ci` - passed, `found 0 vulnerabilities`.
- `npm audit --audit-level=moderate` - passed, `found 0 vulnerabilities`.
- `npx vitest run tests/security.test.ts tests/auth_utils.test.ts tests/wallet.test.ts tests/wallet_browser.test.ts tests/wallet_server.test.ts tests/woc_balance.test.ts tests/wallet_balance.test.ts --testTimeout=20000`
  - 7 files passed, 120 tests passed.
- `npm test -- --testTimeout=20000` - 256 files passed, 2383 tests passed,
  9 skipped.

patches.name: v0.10.0
patches.body:
# World of ClaudeCraft - v0.10.0 Release Notes

**Release:** v0.10.0
**Date:** 2026-06-19
**Previous release:** v0.9.0

v0.10.0 is a large content, audio, and systems release with **281 commits** since
the public v0.9.0 release branch. It adds a broad open-world content pack, 2v2
Fiesta arena, NPC voice-over, spatial sound effects, WoW-style chat channel tabs,
the first Combat Mech cosmetic assets, and the first Aldric meteor storyline hook.

## Highlights

- **Large content bundle**: new class abilities, consumables, rare elites, gear,
  ambient world life, UI comfort options, minimap upgrades, and new reactive enemy
  mechanics from the consolidated pack.
- **2v2 Fiesta arena**: a score-based, respawning party mode with augment waves,
  power-ups, a shrinking hazard ring, standardized level-20 builds, and practice
  bots.
- **Full NPC voice-over pass**: every named NPC has a designed voice, with 164
  generated greeting, quest-offer, and quest-completion lines wired into dialogue.
- **Spatial sound effects**: real 3D positional sound for movement, combat,
  creatures, spell impacts, and ambience.
- **WoW-style chat channel tabs**: channel tabs can be added from a plus menu,
  filter the log, and set the default send channel.
- **Combat Mech cosmetic asset pack**: 15 chroma variants across uncommon, rare,
  and epic tiers, plus preview tooling.
- **Aldric's Fallen Star setup**: the first cosmetic/storyline POI and meteor
  quest path are introduced for the Mirefen Marsh storyline.

## Content & World

- **Consolidated content pack** (#619) brought together 15 feature packs:
  class abilities, consumables, Grix, Druid and Rogue ability packs, rare elites,
  gear-quartermaster content, combat unit visuals, render ambience, mobile-control
  updates, minimap HUD work, and interface-comfort settings.
- **v0.10.0 content pack** (#648) added Crossroads Outfitters gear, Brightwood
  Glade wildlife, and the Warden's Ledger Eastbrook bounty chain.
- **Aldric meteor site and quest content** shipped as the first cosmetic/storyline
  point of interest in Mirefen Marsh, with the meteor object, impact visuals, and
  unknown alien weaponry quest handoff.
- Brightwood Glade gained new beasts, ranger content, items, and related quest
  coverage.
- The Warden's Ledger adds a longer bounty chain that reuses existing zone mobs
  without adding determinism-sensitive spawn shifts.

## Arena & PvP

- **2v2 Fiesta** (#655) adds a new arena format focused on score, respawns, and
  temporary match-only power spikes.
- Players are standardized to level 20 inside Fiesta while preserving their real
  saved level, XP, talents, and character state outside the bout.
- Augments are offered in escalating waves and applied through the same effective
  modifier path used by talents.
- Arena power-ups, parkour cover, a shrinking hazard ring, kill-streak callouts,
  scoreboards, and offline practice bots were added for the mode.

## Audio

- **NPC voice-over** (#620) adds designed voices for named NPCs and plays
  pre-rendered clips when opening NPC dialogue or quest details.
- Voice settings were added for enable/disable and volume control.
- **Spatial SFX** (#661) adds 93 generated sound clips for movement surfaces,
  jumps, landings, swimming, melee, spell casts, impacts, creature families,
  buffs, heals, deaths, and ambient loops.
- Combat music now replaces zone music instead of layering over it (#653),
  producing a cleaner battle transition.

## Chat & Social UI

- **Chat channel tabs** (#631) add per-channel tabs for Say, Yell, Party,
  General, World, LFG, Guild, and Officer.
- Tabs filter the chat log and set the default send channel, while explicit slash
  commands still take precedence.
- `/join world`, `/join lfg`, and related channel commands now mirror into the
  tab bar, and tab state persists across sessions.

## Characters, Abilities & Items

- New class and combat features landed through the consolidated pack, including
  ability packs and class-specific additions such as Druid, Rogue, Shaman,
  Paladin, Warrior, and Mage-adjacent combat updates.
- New consumables, elixirs, quartermaster gear, item comparison helpers, and gear
  readouts were added or expanded.
- **Combat Mech chroma assets** (#671) add 15 model colorways and render-preview
  tooling. This release includes the asset and tooling foundation; later wiring
  connects the chromas to account-wide cosmetic rewards.

## Rendering & World Presentation

- Ambient birds, critters, motes, weather, and environmental rendering systems
  were expanded.
- The meteor impact site adds scorch, debris, rock, glow, and crater presentation
  in Mirefen Marsh while preserving safe navigation.
- New screenshots and visual verification scripts cover content, weather, and
  selected combat/rare-elite scenes.

## Internationalization

- v0.10.0 release translations were filled across supported locales (#639),
  moving the release gate from pending strings to `pending=0`.
- `/gear` readouts, relic and pickup error toasts, and the crypt nameplate were
  localized (#633).
- New release content, settings labels, ability strings, item names, quest text,
  and HUD labels were added to the i18n build outputs and checked by release-tier
  localization gates.

## UI, Mobile & Quality

- Interface-comfort options, low-resource warnings, rested XP indicators,
  compass/coordinates/subzone helpers, minimap zoom, and item comparison UI were
  added or refined.
- Mobile controls and HUD behavior received additional touch-control and layout
  updates through the consolidated pack.
- New tests cover chat tabs, Fiesta, audio/music behavior, meteor quest flow,
  impact-site visuals, ambient rendering, new mob mechanics, item comparison,
  resource warnings, and expanded class abilities.

## Upgrade Notes

- `package.json` is now `0.10.0`.
- The release adds substantial audio under `public/audio/voice/` and
  `public/audio/sfx/`; deployment targets should expect the larger static asset
  footprint.
- Offline generation scripts for voice and SFX read `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` only
  when explicitly run. Runtime game code does not require that key.
- Combat Mech epic chromas rely on future material/render hooks for full chrome
  fidelity; uncommon and rare chromas work with the shared material path.

## Validation

- PR-level validation for the release line included `tsc --noEmit`, `npm run
  build`, release-tier i18n tests, and full Vitest runs recorded across the
  merged release PRs.
- Notable recorded checks include 1960 release-tier tests for the v0.10.0 i18n
  fill, 1961 tests for the consolidated content pack, 1952 tests for spatial
  sound effects, and focused Fiesta, music, chat-channel, meteor, and cosmetic
  regression suites.

*Generated from the public `release/v0.9..release/v0.10.0` release range. PR
numbers reference merged pull requests and source PRs preserved through release
and manual merge commits.*

patches.name: v0.9.1
patches.body:
# World of ClaudeCraft - v0.9 Release Notes

**Release:** v0.9
**Date:** 2026-06-19
**Previous release:** v0.8.0

v0.9 is a systems-and-polish release with **128 commits** since the public v0.8.0
release tag. It lands Inventory/Equipment 2.0 with a classic two-column paperdoll,
a major internationalization architecture overhaul, the Nythraxis attunement
questline, party loot strategies, a broad mobile and touch-controls polish pass,
and a fix to online local-player animation smoothness.

## Highlights

- **Inventory/Equipment 2.0**: four new equipment slots (helm, shoulder, belt,
  gloves), eleven new items, and a two-column WoW-style paperdoll with the model
  framed between the slot columns.
- **Internationalization overhaul**: the locale layer moves to a sparse
  overlay-plus-registry model with a generated dense resolved table, declared-base
  dialects (es_ES, fr_CA, en_CA), a dev-only `en_XA` pseudo-locale, and a two-tier
  release gate so contributor PRs can ship English-only while every locale is
  completed and enforced at release.
- **Nythraxis attunement questline**: a new attunement chain plus a round of
  playtest-driven polish.
- **Party loot strategies**: fair-split and random loot distribution options for
  grouped play.
- **Mobile, movement & animation polish**: reliable touch jump, compact party
  frames, safer menu/trader layouts, mobile safe-area handling, and a fix that
  stops the local player's walk cycle from resetting online.

## Items & Inventory

- **Inventory/Equipment 2.0 added** (#574). Adds four new equipment slots and
  eleven new items, re-landed cleanly onto v0.9.
- The character sheet is now a **two-column paperdoll** with four slots on each
  side of the rendered model, ordered to match the classic WoW character sheet
  (#574).
- **Procedural icons** for the new helm, belt, pauldron, and gauntlet slots were
  added so the new gear renders without external art (#574).
- The four new equipment slot labels are translated in every locale (#574, #585).

## Quests & World Content

- **Nythraxis attunement chain added**, with a follow-up pass polishing the
  questline from playtest feedback (#622).
- **KayKit asset expansion**: additional dungeon, resource, and tool props,
  skeleton enemies, and weapon icons.

## Party & Loot

- **Party loot strategies** (#363): groups can now use fair-split or random loot
  distribution in addition to the default behavior.

## Internationalization

v0.9 rebuilds the localization layer into an overlay-and-registry architecture
without changing what players see in any already-translated string (#575, #576,
#582, #585, #605):

- The authoritative English base and type machinery were extracted, and the
  non-English locales were flattened to sparse, dotted-key overlays.
- A generated dense resolved table is built at build time and consumed by the
  runtime, with a committed byte-equivalence hash so an accidental change to
  resolved output fails loudly instead of shipping silently.
- **Declared-base dialect overlays** (es_ES over es, fr_CA over fr_FR, en_CA over
  en) carry only the keys that genuinely diverge from their base and fall through
  to the base otherwise.
- A no-LLM status scanner produces a generated registry that tracks every key as
  translated, pending, or blocked, and drives the allowlists.
- A dev-only `en_XA` pseudo-locale was added for layout and coverage testing.
- A **two-tier release gate**: contributor pull requests are English-only-legal
  (pending keys render English off-release), while the release-tier gate hard-fails
  on any pending key so a translated locale never ships English.
- Tooling for the maintainer release fill: a data-only fill worklist and a
  locked-terms glossary.
- Remaining pending strings were translated across all locales, and stray
  English terms (for example "Wyrm" in CJK/Cyrillic quests) were localized.

## UI, Mobile & Controls

- **Mobile jump taps are now reliable** (#618).
- Compact mobile party frames (#617) and improved mobile menu/trader panels
  (#615) reduce overlap and clipping on small screens.
- The mobile homepage now respects PWA layout and device safe areas (#596).
- Mobile touch spellbar and menu controls were improved (#580).
- Desktop community links stay visible alongside the mobile layout changes.

## Rendering & Movement

- **Online walk-cycle reset fixed** (#630). The local player's animation state is
  now derived from true interpolated motion rather than the online position
  predictor, so the walk clip no longer snaps back to its first frame while moving.
- Camera follow is now bypassed in Mouse Camera mode so free-look behaves correctly.
- Navigation and camera prop handling were improved as a quality-of-life pass.

## Arena

- Ranked bracket standings are now tracked separately, keeping per-bracket rating
  distinct.

## Security & Anti-Bot

- **Anti-bot false-positive fixes** with a report-only mode (#577), tuning the
  Phase 1 behavioral detection so legitimate players are not actioned while signals
  are still being validated.
- Online sessions now allow **two active sessions per account** (#535), relaxing
  the single-session cap introduced in v0.8.

## Web & Discovery

- **SEO crawl discovery signals** were added so the public site is indexed more
  reliably (#586).

## Refactors & Project Docs

- The HUD was modularized to reduce the size of the monolithic HUD module (#582).
- Internationalization internals were refactored: a thin runtime split from locale
  data, removal of unsafe world-entity and talent dialect casts, and dropping the
  development-phase numbering from comments and doc strings.
- The Docker build context now includes the i18n build scripts so release images
  build the resolved table correctly.

## Fixes & Quality

- The online local-player predictor no longer feeds animation cadence, fixing the
  walk-clip reset and adding regression coverage (#630).
- Anti-bot detection no longer actions legitimate players while in report-only
  mode (#577).
- Mobile layout regressions across party frames, menus, the trader, the homepage,
  and safe areas were resolved (#580, #596, #615, #617, #618).
- Expanded regression coverage across the i18n overlay/registry/resolved-table
  pipeline, inventory and equipment, loot strategies, and the new questline.

## Upgrade Notes

- `package.json` is now `0.9.0`.
- **Inventory/Equipment 2.0** adds new equipment slots; saved character
  equipment/inventory state remains backward compatible (the new slots are
  additive and default to empty for existing characters).
- Online play now permits **two active sessions per account** (previously one);
  operators relying on the single-session cap should note the change.
- **Localization is now release-gated.** On `release/**` branches the build runs
  with `I18N_RELEASE_TIER=1`, which hard-fails on any untranslated (pending) key;
  contributor PRs remain English-only-legal. The generated resolved table
  (`src/ui/i18n.resolved.generated.ts`), its hash baseline
  (`src/ui/i18n.resolved.sha256`), and the status registry
  (`src/ui/i18n.status.json`) are committed artifacts — regenerate them with the
  i18n build/scan scripts after changing any locale data.
- The `en_XA` pseudo-locale is for development and testing only and is not a
  player-facing language.

## Validation

- `npm run test` - 1561 passed across 154 files.
- `npm run build` - completed successfully.

*Generated from the public `v0.8.0..release/v0.9` release range. PR numbers
reference merged pull requests and source PRs preserved through release-batch
merges.*

patches.name: v0.8.0
patches.body:
# World of ClaudeCraft - v0.8 Release Notes

**Release:** v0.8
**Date:** 2026-06-17
**Previous release:** v0.7.0

v0.8 is a major systems release with **107 commits** since the public v0.7.0
tag and more than **16,000 lines changed** across gameplay, server security,
mobile controls, web presentation, community surfaces, and release operations.
The headline themes are ranked 2v2 arena, a new wave of deterministic enemy
affixes, the first behavioral anti-bot system, Turnstile-backed authentication,
a substantially upgraded public home page, more complete mobile play, and a
restart-countdown path for safer live deployments.

---

## Highlights

- **Ranked 2v2 arena** - Ashen Coliseum now supports solo and premade 2v2
  queueing, team matchmaking, shared Elo changes, proper defeated states, and
  team-aware arena targeting.
- **Reactive enemy affixes** - twelve additional enemy mechanics make open-world
  combat more tactical: reflected damage, silence, chill, fear, lifesteal, mana
  burn, roots, attack-speed slows, intellect drains, ally healing, and delayed
  death explosions.
- **Behavioral anti-bot hardening** - the server can now track action cadence,
  reaction-time patterns, and concurrent-session pressure, then throttle, report,
  or remove suspicious sessions.
- **Stronger authentication controls** - Cloudflare Turnstile can gate login and
  registration, production auth can require browser-origin requests, and online
  play is capped to one active character per account.
- **Mobile play polish** - touch camera swipes, stable in-game menu controls,
  better XP ring spacing, hotbar state clearing, and Ghost Wolf input fixes make
  phones and tablets smoother.
- **Richer public web surface** - the home page gains a cinematic trailer
  backdrop, redesigned play console, theme music assets, News & Updates, the
  community wiki entry point, official links pages, and the `$WOC` copy widget.
- **Safer live deploys** - the server exposes a secret-protected internal restart
  countdown trigger so operators can warn players before a planned restart.

---

## Arena & PvP

### Ranked 2v2 Ashen Coliseum

- Adds ranked 2v2 to Ashen Coliseum (#502).
- Players can queue solo or as a two-player premade party.
- Matchmaking can form premade-vs-premade, premade-vs-solos, or solo-vs-solo
  teams depending on queue population.
- Arena snapshots now carry match format, queue size, bracket state, teammate
  and opponent combatants, match return timers, and arena-specific state needed
  by the HUD.
- Team Elo changes are applied consistently to both teammates, with win and loss
  records tracked per player.
- Arena countdown, match-found, match-start, and result messages are covered by
  the sim localization matcher.

### Defeated States And Targeting

- Arena deaths now use a real defeated 0 HP state instead of keeping defeated
  players artificially clamped at 1 HP.
- Defeated players can no longer keep fighting during the bout.
- Defeated players cannot release spirit during an arena match.
- Players are revived automatically when the arena returns them to the world.
- Tab-targeting and nearest-enemy targeting now include arena opponents during
  countdown and active match flow.
- Additional arena regression coverage verifies queue behavior, team formation,
  death handling, targeting, result events, and snapshot state.

---

## Enemy Combat & World Content

v0.8 continues the "living enemies" work from v0.7 with a broad set of new
deterministic mob mechanics (#487 and source PRs #386, #389, #427, #431, #435,
#442, #444, #445, #446, #447, #448, #460).

### New Enemy Affixes

- **Bristled Hide** - Wild Boars and Elder Bristlebacks reflect flat melee damage
  back to attackers.
- **Silencing Shriek** - Gravecaller Summoners can silence spellcasters on hit.
- **Numbing Chill** - Stormcrag Elementals can slow movement.
- **Withering Wail** - Restless Bones can sap attack power.
- **Drowning Grasp** - Drowned Dead can heal from the damage they deal.
- **Bog Bloat / Caustic Spores** - volatile marsh creatures arm a short fuse on
  death, then burst in an area.
- **Mana Sear** - Wyrmcult Necromancers can burn mana from casters.
- **Sticky Web** - Webwood spiders can root players in place.
- **Miring Pounce** - Mire Prowlers can slow attack speed.
- **Wail of the Grave** - Gravecaller Summoners can fear victims.
- **Grave Mending** - Gravecaller Menders heal nearby wounded allies.
- **Maddening Whisper** - Wyrmcult Zealots can drain Intellect from mana users.

### Combat Tuning And Readability

- Mob armor now scales from level 1 like HP and damage, removing an unintended
  extra armor level from every mob (#180).
- Higher-level targets are now much harder to hit, reducing power-leveling
  against enemies far above the attacker (#443).
- Ranged auto-attacks now lose crit chance against higher-level targets the same
  way melee auto-attacks do (#209).
- Green floating heal numbers now appear over any healed entity, not only the
  local player, making enemy lifesteal and support healing easier to read.
- `You are silenced!` cast-block text is localized through the sim matcher.

### Fishing Quest

- Adds **The Codfather** fishing quest in Fenbridge (#481).
- Adds a special quest-only catch in Deepfen Shallows.
- Adds localized quest text, item data, icon support, progression tests, and
  a render helper for fishing screenshots.

---

## Security, Moderation & Anti-Bot

### Login And Registration Protection

- Adds Cloudflare Turnstile support for login and registration (#462).
- When `TURNSTILE_SECRET` and `VITE_TURNSTILE_SITEKEY` are configured, auth
  requests must carry a valid Turnstile token.
- Turnstile verification fails closed on verification errors.
- Docker and deploy config pass Turnstile keys through the correct build-time
  and runtime environments.
- Production login and registration can require a browser-origin request (#441).
- `WEB_ORIGINS` and `REQUIRE_WEB_LOGIN` controls allow operators to configure
  strict origin behavior behind the reverse proxy.

### Online Session Integrity

- Online play is capped to one active character per account (#439).
- GM accounts remain exempt for supervision.
- WebSocket sessions now collect per-IP bot-pressure evidence when many sessions
  originate from the same source.
- Extreme per-IP session pressure can be rejected before the session joins the
  world.

### Behavioral Bot Detection

- Adds the first behavioral bot detection system (#486).
- Tracks action timing variance, reaction timing, and concurrent-session evidence.
- Can auto-report high-confidence suspicious sessions.
- Can shadow-throttle suspicious sessions before escalating.
- Can kick sustained high-confidence sessions.
- Adds a detailed design document at `docs/security/behavioral-bot-detection.md`.
- Adds unit and database coverage for bot evidence, scoring, persistence, and
  moderation integration.

### Chat Moderation

- Chat filtering now uses the admin hard list as the sole slur-enforcement
  trigger (#496).
- Admin account detail includes chat mute and strike controls, including admin
  visibility for moderation review.
- The admin chat-filter tab can list chat-moderated accounts.
- Chat filter escalation, mute state, violations, and admin actions have expanded
  tests.

---

## Server Operations & Deployment

- Adds `POST /internal/restart-countdown`, a secret-protected loopback deployment
  endpoint for planned restarts (#518).
- The endpoint is disabled unless `RESTART_COUNTDOWN_SECRET` is configured.
- The endpoint requires `X-WOC-Deploy-Secret` and uses timing-safe comparison.
- A triggered countdown broadcasts global system messages at 10 minutes, 5
  minutes, 2 minutes, 1 minute, 30 seconds, 10 seconds, and restart time.
- Duplicate active countdown triggers are rejected with conflict status.
- Docker Compose passes `RESTART_COUNTDOWN_SECRET` into the game container.
- Restart countdown server messages are localized through `server_i18n`.
- Tests cover countdown ordering, duplicate suppression, endpoint auth, and
  localization.

---

## UI, Mobile & Controls

### Mobile Touch Controls

- Adds touch camera swipe controls (#493).
- Polishes release menu screens, mobile menu spacing, and XP spacing (#488,
  #494, #498, #507).
- The mobile in-game community rail is now a single Community button.
- Mobile More controls now open in a draggable modal with a close button (#507).
- The mobile Menu action inside More opens the game menu directly.
- Attack, Autorun, Jump, Target, Use, Chat, and More remain stable while More
  opens and closes.
- Mobile combat-row and spell-bar spacing were adjusted to prevent overlap.
- Mobile hotbar hover state now clears after tapping while preserving the short
  activated flash (#505).
- Hotbar focus clears after activation so pressing Space does not recast the last
  clicked ability (#505).
- Space remains a gameplay input after the v0.8 merge, preserving expected
  keyboard behavior on `main`.

### Class And Combat Presentation

- Ghost Wolf no longer cancels from damage taken, passive retaliation, jumping,
  running, out-of-range attack attempts, or right-mouse camera drags over enemies
  (#505).
- Ghost Wolf backpedaling now uses reversed forward locomotion while normal
  humanoid backpedal keeps its authored animation.
- Cast bars now show a localized remaining-time countdown (#268).
- Rogue and Druid combo points now appear as pips over the target nameplate
  (#418).
- Pet feeding is now toggleable from the HUD/server path.

---

## Rendering & Presentation

- Adds ambient leaping fish that break the surface of open water (#424).
- The fish effect is render-only, deterministic, and samples the same terrain and
  water data as the simulation.
- Restores Brother Aldric's pre-v0.7 classic character model (#499).
- Adds a fallback path when high-tier render assets are absent (#511), protecting
  fresh or partial asset installs from blank/missing model states.
- Adds a separate animation-state helper for character visuals.
- Adds combo-point nameplate rendering support.
- Expands the generated media manifest to include v0.8 public media assets.

---

## Home, Community & Web

### Home Page

- The public home page now has a cinematic trailer backdrop.
- The play console is redesigned around the current game presentation.
- Public trailer video and trailer-poster assets are included.
- Main-theme audio is included for the web shell.
- Home-screen music behavior was quieted so the shell does not unexpectedly play
  over the first screen.
- The footer version is updated for 0.8.

### News, Wiki, And Social Links

- Adds a public News & Updates view that reads published GitHub Releases through
  a cached server proxy instead of calling GitHub directly from every browser.
- Adds updates to the News & Updates page for the v0.8 surface.
- Surfaces the community wiki from the home page.
- Adds a copy widget and community-token note for the `$WOC` contract address
  (#437).
- Adds a fully localized official-channels page at `/links` (#453).
- Adds aliases for `/social` and `/social-media-links`.
- The links page includes Play, X, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Reddit, and GitHub
  entries with accessibility, SEO, JSON-LD, desktop, and mobile checks.

---

## Localization & Content Architecture

- Renames i18n internals from development-phase names to content-based names
  without changing translation behavior (#464).
- `EntityTranslationPhase` becomes `EntityTranslationGroup`.
- `phase9_i18n.ts` is renamed to `world_entity_i18n.ts`.
- Server-sent restart countdown messages are localized.
- The links page is translated into all supported locales.
- The silenced cast-block message is localized through the sim matcher.
- Existing localization coverage and drift tests are expanded to include the new
  arena, affix, web, and server-message surfaces.

---

## Contributor & Project Docs

- Adds `CONTRIBUTING.md` (#398).
- Adds translated contributor guides in `docs/i18n/`.
- Moves localized README and CONTRIBUTING files under `docs/i18n/` to keep the
  repository root focused.
- Adds pull request templates.
- Adds issue templates for bugs and feature requests.
- Adds a code of conduct.
- Adds a security policy.
- Links the contributor guide from README and translated READMEs.
- Adds detailed behavioral bot detection docs.
- Adds v0.8 release notes under `docs/release-notes/`.

---

## Fixes & Quality

- Private realm join and leave notices no longer broadcast every player entry
  and departure to the whole realm.
- The teleport interpolation-anchor regression is locked by tests (#199).
- Mobile hotbar hover state clears correctly after tapping.
- Space remains available as gameplay input after activation/focus changes.
- Ghost Wolf cancellation rules are stabilized across combat, movement, jump,
  camera, and input edge cases.
- Release menu and XP UI spacing are polished.
- Render asset fallback protects missing high-tier assets.
- Mob affix bugs around chill and demoralize application are fixed.
- Home-screen audio behavior is less intrusive.
- Brother Aldric's classic model is restored.

---

## Test And Verification Coverage

New or expanded coverage includes:

- Ranked 2v2 arena queue, matchmaking, team formation, snapshots, defeated state,
  targeting, result flow, and Elo updates.
- Behavioral bot scoring, action cadence, reaction-time evidence, per-IP evidence,
  database writes, and moderation integration.
- Turnstile verification and web-origin login guards.
- Each new mob affix, including silence, chill, demoralize, lifesteal, death
  explosion, mana burn, root, slow, fear, mending, thorns, and intellect drain.
- Fishing quest progression and render helpers.
- Mobile controls, touch camera swipes, in-game menu controls, hotbar hover
  clearing, and gameplay input retention.
- Nameplate combo points.
- Render asset fallback behavior.
- Ambient fish rendering helpers.
- Links page rendering, routing, SEO, JSON-LD, desktop layout, mobile overflow,
  and tap-target checks.
- Restart countdown endpoint auth, countdown scheduling, duplicate rejection, and
  server-message localization.
- Chat filter moderation, hard-list enforcement, mute controls, and account detail
  state.

Verified before release promotion:

- `npm run test` passed with 1393 tests across 143 files after the restart
  countdown merge was resolved onto `release/v0.8`.
- `npm run build` completed successfully after the restart countdown merge was
  resolved onto `release/v0.8`.
- `npm run build:server` completed successfully after the restart countdown merge
  was resolved onto `release/v0.8`.
- `node scripts/links_verify.mjs` passed during the links-page release work.

---

## Upgrade Notes

- `package.json` is now `0.8.0`.
- To enable Turnstile in an environment, configure both:
  - `TURNSTILE_SECRET` on the server at runtime.
  - `VITE_TURNSTILE_SITEKEY` at client build time.
- To require browser-origin auth checks in production, configure `REQUIRE_WEB_LOGIN`
  and verify `WEB_ORIGINS` or reverse-proxy host headers.
- The new `/api/releases` endpoint reads public GitHub Releases and may use
  `GITHUB_TOKEN` server-side to raise GitHub API rate limits.
- To use planned-restart warnings, configure `RESTART_COUNTDOWN_SECRET` in the
  game container environment and call `/internal/restart-countdown` from trusted
  deployment automation.
- The v0.8 release adds several new public media assets. Fresh deploys should
  rebuild the client and regenerate the media manifest.

---

## Known Notes

- The release includes substantial server-integrity, auth, arena, mobile, and web
  surface area. After deployment, smoke test login, character select, world entry,
  arena queueing, mobile entry, the home page, `/links`, and the admin dashboard.
- Behavioral bot detection starts as a Phase 1 system. Operators should monitor
  auto-reports and tune thresholds before treating them as final enforcement
  policy.
- Planned restart countdowns require the newly deployed server code and a
  configured `RESTART_COUNTDOWN_SECRET`; older running containers will return
  404 until recreated with the new environment.

---

*Generated from the `v0.7.0..main` release range. PR numbers reference merged
pull requests and source PRs preserved through release-batch merges; some direct
commits are grouped by theme above.*

patches.name: v0.7.0
patches.body:
# World of ClaudeCraft v0.7 Release Notes

Branch: `release/v0.7`
Release head: `9fa47fa`
Baseline: `v0.6.0`

## Highlights

- Adds **The Drowned Temple**, a new portal-reached 5-player group dungeon.
- Reworks character presentation with **KayKit full-pack models**, merged animation
sets, per-player skins, chroma selection, and an in-game character-sheet preview.
- Adds new character visuals for **Druid Cat Form** and Warlock **Imp** and
**Voidwalker** demon pets.
- Adds a broad set of reactive enemy-AI behaviours: fleeing, frenzy, self-healing,
cleave, pack rage, poison, armor shred, healing reduction, and War Stomp.
- Adds first-class mobile and touch support: joystick movement, touch action buttons,
pinch-to-zoom, haptics, left-handed layout, safe-area handling, and accessibility
settings.
- Localizes the game, sim text, server messages, admin dashboard, and README files
across supported locales.
- Adds dozens of chat and slash commands for social play, accessibility, self-state
readouts, targeting, awareness, world state, pets, arena, market, and inventory.
- Hardens PvP, auth, WebSocket, moderation, profanity filtering, stored-XSS,
character caps, trade/duel validation, loot rights, and realm-scoped persistence.

## Gameplay

### Drowned Temple

- Adds The Drowned Temple as a new 5-player dungeon reached through a world portal.
- Adds deterministic dungeon entry, spawn, targetability, and encounter coverage.
- Adds screenshots and world presentation assets for the temple experience.

### Character Models, Skins, And Pets

- Adds KayKit full-pack player character models with merged animation sets and
per-player skins.
- Adds online character-creation chroma selection matching offline creation.
- Persists chroma/skin choice into initial online character state.
- Returns character skin data in summaries so existing characters preview correctly.
- Adds an in-game character-model preview to the character sheet.
- Adds centered 1-4 chroma buttons to the in-game character model preview.
- Adds shared `IWorld.changeSkin` and an online WebSocket command so live skin changes
sync through snapshots.
- Adds a dedicated Druid Cat Form visual.
- Adds summonable Warlock Imp and Voidwalker demon pets.
- Fixes weapon attachment rendering on the new character rigs.
- Rebuilds and optimizes the wild boar model, including follow-up animation and asset
fixes.

### Enemy AI And Combat Mechanics

- Adds War Stomp as a periodic boss stun slam.
- Makes enraged mobs frenzy faster as they are worn down.
- Lets desperate mobs self-heal once when first wounded low.
- Adds melee cleave behaviour for selected mobs.
- Adds pack frenzy when nearby packmates are slain.
- Adds venomous on-hit poison DoTs.
- Adds Mortal Strike-style healing reduction wounds.
- Adds Acid Spit-style armor shred.
- Adds cowardly low-health fleeing and calls for help.
- Makes trivial low-level mobs passive toward much higher-level players.
- Improves mob pathing so chasing mobs slide around camp props instead of pinning.

### PvP, Duels, And Arena

- Fixes pets attacking hostile players in accepted PvP contexts.
- Fixes right-click player targeting/interactions in duels.
- Fixes hostile player spell targeting for Warlock, Mage, Druid, Paladin, Rogue,
Hunter, Shaman, and shared ability paths where applicable.
- Fixes Life Tap, Curse of Agony, Drain Life, Arcane Explosion, and Consecration in
duel/arena hostile-player contexts.
- Makes Polymorph work on hostile players while continuing to reject non-hostile NPCs.
- Makes Polymorph heal affected targets back to full health when applied.
- Adds PvP diminishing returns for repeated duel Polymorphs: 10s, then 5s, then 1s,
resetting after 60 seconds.
- Hides stealthed hostile duel opponents from the opposing player, including
close-range opponents and party members who become duel-hostile.
- Prunes a previously visible duel opponent from client snapshots when they enter
Stealth so stale character models do not linger.
- Makes Fear force the target to run in a deterministic panic direction instead of
behaving like a simple stun.
- Adds PvP diminishing returns for repeated duel Fears: 8s, then 4s, then 2s, then
1s, resetting after 60 seconds.
- Clears opponent debuffs when duels end so DoTs cannot kill the loser afterward.

## Chat And Slash Commands

### Social And Utility Commands

- Adds `/help` command listing and clearer help text.
- Adds `/roll` for loot disputes.
- Adds `/afk` and `/dnd` with whisper auto-replies.
- Adds `/r` to reply to the last whisper.
- Adds `/follow` to trail another player.
- Adds `/inspect` for cross-player level, class, and health readouts.
- Adds `/join world` and `/join lfg` global chat channels.
- Adds `/played` session time.
- Adds `/where` for zone, level range, and coordinates.
- Adds target-nearest and cycle-friendly targeting commands.

### Self-Only Readout Commands

- Adds character and progression readouts: `/stats`, `/xp`, `/gold`, `/gear`,
`/abilities`, `/session`, and `/played`.
- Adds combat and state readouts: `/combat`, `/casting`, `/cooldowns`, `/buffs`,
`/combo`, `/queued`, `/attack`, `/speed`, `/overpower`, `/form`, `/falling`,
`/manaregen`, `/savedmana`, `/potion`, and `/consumable`.
- Adds targeting and awareness readouts: `/target`, `/targetbuffs`, `/range`,
`/consider`, `/threat`, and `/nearby`.
- Adds world and social readouts: `/zones`, `/pois`, `/graveyard`, `/dungeons`,
`/completed`, `/quest`, `/party`, `/pet`, `/pettaunt`, `/arena`, `/listings`,
`/buyback`, and `/bags`.

## Mobile And Touch Controls

- Adds a floating move joystick that springs to the player's thumb.
- Adds touch buttons for Jump, Autorun, Bags, Character, Leaderboard/Ranks, Emotes,
and nameplates.
- Adds pinch-to-zoom for the touch camera.
- Adds long-press action-bar tooltip peek without casting.
- Adds Music toggle support in the More tray.
- Adds left-handed layout that mirrors joystick placement.
- Adds idle joystick fade to reduce visual obstruction.
- Adds haptic feedback and a Haptics toggle.
- Caps the More tray height on short phones.
- Promotes Interact/Use to the primary touch row.
- Adds Touch Controls Opacity and Touch Look Speed accessibility settings.
- Adds safe-area handling for notches around HUD, touch chat, and the social rail.
- Stabilizes joystick pointer handling.
- Hides touch controls before world entry.
- Improves mobile shell entry and screenshot tooling.

## UI And Controls

- Adds emote wheel support.
- Adds camera collision.
- Adds draggable modal windows.
- Adds guild leave confirmation.
- Makes Escape close the game menu.
- Anchors the bags window into the bottom HUD gap.
- Smooths automatic camera movement and nameplate motion.
- Smooths orbit and click-to-move turns.
- Lets the click-move button become a camera drag.
- Removes the redundant language selector from the home header nav.
- Keeps default keybinds for actions missing from older saved data.
- Restores focus after quest windows close.
- Prevents quest text and mobile window overflow.

## Localization

- Localizes HUD, abilities, items, commerce, quests, world surfaces, and the home
shell across supported locales.
- Localizes talent names with canonical terminology and shared override tables.
- Localizes server-sent system messages and sim event text through the client matcher.
- Adds a sim-emit drift guard test to prevent English-only text from leaking through.
- Localizes the admin dashboard across supported locales, including online-player
zones, class labels, moderation/operator errors, currency suffixes, relative times,
and chart tooltips.
- Translates the README into 12 languages with tech-stack badges and language nav.
- Fixes cross-language leaks, copied-English values, stripped strings, French and
Spanish talent terminology, restored diacritics, quest narrative interpolation,
`/who` dead/dungeon status, disconnect strings, and mobile locale-selector clipping.

## Security, Moderation, And Data Integrity

- Adds an admin-managed chat profanity filter with soft and hard word tiers.
- Adds slur enforcement and escalation.
- Adds admin chat mute tooling.
- Adds automatic suspicious-registration reports.
- Escapes untrusted player names to prevent stored XSS.
- Bounds WebSocket handshake buffering.
- Preserves client input sent during auth handshake.
- Fixes auth-throttle eviction so live lockout counters are not wiped under load.
- Enforces character caps atomically.
- Rejects renaming a character while it is online.
- Closes play sessions correctly after fast disconnects.
- Scopes orphan play-session cleanup to the current realm.
- Requires real damage to claim mob tap rights.
- Prevents stealthed players from shielding visible allies from aggro.
- Revalidates trade and duel availability when invites are accepted.
- Confirms friend/ignore membership before reporting removal success.
- Updates audited dependency hygiene and indexes registration-metadata checks.

## Performance And Infrastructure

- Adds a browser performance doctor for in-app diagnostics.
- Improves browser and mobile performance feel.
- Expands hashed media asset handling for the new model set.
- Keeps release build/server build paths compatible with fresh installs.

## Reinforcement Learning And Headless Env

- Exposes the full class kit in the RL action and observation spaces.
- Normalizes target-distance observation on the same scale as nearby mobs.
- Adds a derived observation index and related test coverage.

## Community And Documentation

- Adds a MediaWiki community/fandom site with deterministic seed generation.
- Standardizes brand casing on "World of ClaudeCraft" across UI, docs, and SEO copy.
- Documents UI, UX, mobile, and accessibility standards.
- Makes `CLAUDE.md` the canonical project context referenced by `GEMINI.md` and
`AGENTS.md`.
- Refreshes stale subdirectory context docs.
- Mandates full localization for player-facing strings.

## Test And Verification Coverage

New or expanded coverage includes:

- Dungeon entry, spawn, targetability, and encounter tests.
- Character skin persistence, preview, and snapshot tests.
- Visual manifest and animation-state tests.
- Boar asset regression tests.
- Enemy AI behaviour tests for flee, stomp, venom, cleave, pack behaviour, and
related mechanics.
- PvP safety tests across duels, arena, pets, hostile targeting, Polymorph, Fear,
Stealth, AoE, DoTs, and control effects.
- Client interest and snapshot-pruning tests.
- Mobile touch, shell, joystick, settings, and tooltip-peek tests.
- Localization drift and admin localization tests.
- Chat filter, mute, moderation, registration-abuse, and security tests.
- Performance, graphics settings, click-move, camera, and UI regression tests.

Verified before release promotion:

- `npm test` passed locally during the final PvP fix batch.
- `npm run build` passed locally during the final PvP fix batch.
- `npm audit --audit-level=high` reported 0 vulnerabilities during the final PvP
fix batch.
- GitHub Actions CI passed on PR #432 before merge to `release/v0.7`.

## Upgrade Notes

- Determinism and i18n invariants remain unchanged. New sim behaviour runs through
the shared deterministic core, and player-facing strings should continue to go
through localization.
- Mobile touch controls and accessibility settings are available immediately with no
manual migration required.
- Operators should verify their admin dashboard locale. Moderation now includes chat
mute, profanity-filter management, and suspicious-registration reporting.
- Tag the final release as `v0.7.0` to match prior release conventions.

## Known Notes

- The release includes a very large model, localization, mobile, and server-integrity
surface area. Validate production after deployment with login, character select,
world entry, mobile entry, dungeon entry, duel/arena PvP, and admin dashboard smoke
checks.
- The Drowned Temple is the new 5-player dungeon content slice for this release; any
larger dungeon progression expansion remains future work.

Generated from the `v0.6.0..release/v0.7` commit range, with final PvP fixes through
PR #432 included.

patches.name: v0.6.0
patches.body:
# World of ClaudeCraft v0.6 Release Notes

Branch: `release/v0.6`
Release head: `ac7e28b`
Release branch head: `b7751a9`
Baseline: `v0.5.0`

## Highlights

- Adds the first full **Talent Trees and Specializations** system across playable classes, with class trees, spec
trees, talent points, signature abilities, mastery passives, active talents, passive modifiers, choice nodes,
loadouts, and build-string import/export.
- Adds **Max-Level XP Overflow**, letting capped players keep earning lifetime XP toward virtual levels,
prestige, and player-facing lifetime-XP leaderboards.
- Adds a **Live World Map** with zoom and real-time friend/guildmate position updates.
- Adds **Talent Build Loadouts**, allowing players to save, switch, export, import, and delete builds, with
hotbar restoration.
- Replaces remaining native browser prompts/selects with themed in-game dialogs and dropdowns.
- Adds a large security, correctness, combat, pet, social, quest, and QoL cleanup batch from the open PR queue.
- Includes final UI polish: donate button, Click to Move moved into Key Bindings, v0.6 build metadata, camera-
drag movement fix, and better missing-tree handling.

## Gameplay

### Talent Trees And Specializations

- Adds a two-layer talent model:
  - **Class tree**: shared class identity that survives spec changes.
  - **Spec tree**: specialization-specific talents tied to the selected spec.
- Adds talent points starting at level 10.
- Adds one shared point budget across class and spec trees.
- Adds three specs per playable class.
- Adds spec roles: tank, healer, or DPS.
- Adds spec signature abilities.
- Adds mastery passives.
- Adds passive talents that modify stats, damage, healing, threat, costs, cooldowns, and cast times.
- Adds active talent nodes that grant abilities.
- Adds choice nodes with WoW-style option flyouts.
- Adds prerequisite and point-gate validation.
- Adds dormant-node handling for staged builds whose dependencies are no longer valid.
- Adds server-authoritative talent validation.
- Precomputes talent modifiers when builds are applied, so combat does not walk the tree during hot paths.
- Adds talent persistence through existing character state storage.

### Talent Loadouts

- Adds named talent build loadouts.
- Adds save, switch, delete, import, and export flows.
- Saves hotbar ability layout with each loadout.
- Restores hotbar layout when switching loadouts.
- Revalidates imported build strings server-side before applying.
- Blocks unsafe talent/loadout changes during combat.
- Adds themed in-game dialogs for loadout naming, import, export, and deletion.

### Max-Level XP Overflow And Prestige

- Level-capped characters now continue earning lifetime XP.
- Adds virtual post-cap level progression.
- Adds gold overflow XP bar styling.
- Adds lifetime-XP leaderboard support.
- Adds prestige rank support.
- Prestige is cosmetic and does not remove level, gear, talents, or learned abilities.
- Adds anti-abuse checks so prestige rank cannot exceed XP actually earned.
- Adds lifetime-XP persistence and backfill behavior for existing characters.
- Adds indexed lifetime-XP leaderboard queries.

### Live World Map

- Adds zoomable world map behavior.
- Streams live friend and guildmate positions.
- Adds no-DB social position updates for online allies.
- Keeps non-friends/non-guildmates hidden.
- Improves map marker/icon consistency.
- Improves class icon and portrait consistency.

## UI And Controls

- Adds the Talent panel to the HUD and mobile controls.
- Adds unspent-talent-point discoverability.
- Adds level-10 talent unlock nudging.
- Moves Click to Move into Key Bindings.
- Adds donate button/link.
- Adds v0.6 build metadata.
- Fixes camera dragging cancelling held movement keys.
- Adds placeholder handling for missing class trees.
- Replaces remaining native `prompt`, `confirm`, and `<select>` flows with themed in-app components.
- Pauses music while the game menu is open.

## Combat, Pets, And World Fixes

- Fixes armor incorrectly mitigating spell-school AoE damage.
- Requires real damage to claim mob tap rights.
- Keeps pet owners in combat while their pet is fighting.
- Re-buckets pets in the spatial grid when they warp to their owner.
- Keeps enemy HP bars visible on screen.
- Fixes Gravecaller Summoners and similar camp-prop evade cases.
- Shortens Mogger quest respawn timing.
- Prevents mana potions from being wasted at full mana.
- Ensures quest-gated loot only drops when the quest actually collects that item.

## Social And Chat

- Adds player emotes including `/wave`, `/dance`, and `/me`.
- Applies ignore lists to guild and officer chat.
- Rejects friending a player you are already ignoring.
- Prevents a second guild invite from clobbering an existing pending invite.
- Makes guild creation and joins atomic.
- Confirms friend/ignore membership before reporting removal success.
- Improves live social/map presence behavior.

## Quest, Vendor, Inventory, And Market

- Allows discarding quest items.
- Rejects non-finite `market_list` counts.
- Keeps market input validation safer.
- Improves quest-gated loot correctness.
- Keeps vendor/inventory flows compatible with the new QoL batch.

## Security, Auth, And Data Integrity

- Escapes untrusted player names to prevent stored XSS in rendered UI surfaces.
- Fixes auth-throttle backstop behavior so live lockout counters are not wiped incorrectly.
- Caches banlist reads instead of reading from disk on every name validation.
- Returns 409 instead of 500 on racing duplicate registration.
- Clears `banned_at` when downgrading a ban to a suspension.
- Rejects renaming a character while it is online.
- Keeps source PRs explicitly marked as superseded by the v0.6 release PR for traceability.

## Test And Verification Coverage

New or expanded coverage includes:

- Talent tree validation.
- Talent point economy.
- Talent allocation validation.
- Spec switching and class-tree preservation.
- Active/passive talent effects.
- Ability modifiers.
- Choice nodes.
- Talent persistence.
- Talent loadouts.
- Build-string import/export.
- Client snapshot decoding.
- Max-Level XP overflow.
- Virtual levels.
- Prestige anti-abuse behavior.
- Lifetime-XP persistence and leaderboard behavior.
- Live social position streaming.
- Emotes.
- Guild/officer ignore behavior.
- Duplicate registration handling.
- Auth throttling.
- Market count validation.
- Pet combat and spatial rebucketing.
- Quest-gated loot.
- Mana potion behavior.
- Enemy HP bar projection.
- Camera drag movement behavior.

## Security, Exploit Prevention, And Correctness

v0.6 includes a substantial hardening pass across auth, chat, guilds, market input, player-name rendering, mob
tagging, pets, and moderation state. These changes reduce griefing paths, prevent unsafe UI rendering, close
edge-case economy/input bugs, and make several social/guild operations atomic and harder to abuse.

patches.name: v0.5.0
patches.body:
# World of ClaudeCraft v0.5 Release Notes

Branch: `release/v0.5`
Release head: `b1d9f28`
Baseline: `v0.4.0`

## Highlights

- Expands the **Ashen Coliseum** with arena polish, safer match cleanup, countdown/
buff fixes, root diminishing, camera bounds, and realm-scoped leaderboard
correctness.
- Adds the first **fishing loop**: buy a Simple Fishing Pole, cast at fishable
water, complete a cast bar, and catch early fishing loot.
- Adds **Mogger**, a starter-zone rare elite inspired by classic MMO outdoor bosses,
alongside new outdoor rares, richer loot tables, dungeon boss loot tuning, and group
loot rolling.
- Adds **party-visible target markers** and **personal quest corpse loot**, making
group questing clearer and less frustrating.
- Improves controls with **custom hover cursors**, optional **OSRS-style Mouse
Camera**, optional click-to-move, and reduced pointer-lock spam.
- Delivers major QoL across action bars, vendors, chat, social discovery, mobile
controls, friendly targeting, and combat feel.
- Hardens release safety with CI, auth rate-limit fixes, case-insensitive character-
name uniqueness, autosave bounds, and admin account moderation tools.

## Gameplay

### Ashen Coliseum Arena

- Improves the 1v1 ranked arena introduced in v0.4.
- Adds a 5-second arena aftermath before players return to the world.
- Cleanses effects and restores player state when arena matches end.
- Preserves valid countdown buffs into active combat.
- Adds diminishing returns for repeated arena roots.
- Fixes arena forfeit/disconnect handling so survivors return cleanly.
- Keeps the chase camera inside Ashen Coliseum walls.
- Snaps remote entities correctly after teleporting into arena.
- Scopes arena leaderboard results to the current realm.
- Auto-closes the arena queue panel when a match starts.
- Keeps arena Elo/win/loss state persistent and reboot-safe.

### Fishing

- Adds Fisherman Brandt as the first fishing-loop entry point.
- Adds Simple Fishing Pole purchase flow.
- Adds fishable-water checks.
- Adds fishing cast behavior using the shared cast-bar system.
- Adds early catches including Raw Mirror Trout and Tangled Weed.
- Adds movement/damage cancellation coverage for fishing casts.
- This is intentionally a scoped first slice, not the full professions/crafting
system.

### Mogger, Rares, And Loot

- Adds Mogger as a level-appropriate rare elite boss.
- Adds a questline/content path around killing Mogger.
- Adds new outdoor rare spawns.
- Expands loot tables across world and dungeon content.
- Adds improved dungeon boss loot tuning.
- Adds group rolling support.
- Adds an export script for loot spreadsheet review.
- Adds stronger tests around progression, loot, and quest reward behavior.

### Group Questing

- Adds personal quest corpse loot for eligible party members.
- Lets multiple party members loot their own quest drops from the same corpse.
- Keeps corpses lootable until all eligible personal quest loot has been claimed.
- Adds regression coverage for party quest-drop behavior.

### Target Markers

- Adds party-visible target markers above enemies.
- Supports marking valid hostile targets from party context.
- Shares marker state with party members only.
- Keeps marker visibility isolated from non-party players.
- Adds marker clear behavior and test coverage.

## Controls And UX

### Mouse And Camera

- Adds optional **Mouse Camera** mode.
- Mouse Camera mode uses camera-relative movement.
- In Mouse Camera mode, A/D strafe instead of turning.
- Mouse drag rotates the camera without pointer lock.
- Default mode remains classic: A/D turn, right-drag mouselooks, Q/E strafe.
- Adds custom cursor assets:
  - default hand cursor
  - hostile attack cursor
  - friendly shield cursor
  - camera grab cursor
- Reduces pointer-lock permission spam by requesting pointer lock only after real
drag movement.
- Adds browser fullscreen setting.
- Adds optional click-to-move / click-to-approach behavior, off by default.

### Action Bar And Consumables

- Allows dragging spellbook abilities onto the hotbar.
- Allows replacing full action-bar slots.
- Allows clearing/removing action-bar slots.
- Adds food and drink action-bar shortcuts.
- Adds full action-bar replacement regression coverage.
- Fixes quest reward preview/turn-in mismatch.

### Vendor And Inventory

- Adds vendor stack selling.
- Adds vendor item buyback.
- Keeps vendor/bag UI fresher after item changes.
- Adds safer sell/buyback tests around inventory state.

### Mobile

- Exposes quest log from mobile controls.
- Caps mobile quest and NPC panel width so dialogs do not fill the entire screen.
- Keeps mobile interaction panels easier to read during gameplay.

## Combat And World Fixes

- Adds caster ranged auto-attacks for wand-style class feel.
- Adds friendly spell targeting for healing and buffing.
- Improves mana recovery pacing and consumable hooks.
- Adds potion/global consumable pacing coverage.
- Tunes mob reset and social pull behavior.
- Makes evading mobs immune to damage while resetting.
- Fixes online leash anchor initialization.
- Rejects party invites accepted while already in a party.
- Adds PvP safety coverage so hostile player damage/CC cannot leak into normal open-
world play outside accepted PvP contexts.
- Adds deterministic dungeon entry/spawn/targetability regression coverage.

## Social And Chat

- Routes `/g` to guild chat now that guild chat exists.
- Keeps `/general` as world/general chat.
- Remembers the last explicit chat channel, including guild and whisper targets.
- Adds `/who` for online player discovery.
- Improves guild/friends status clarity.
- Adds social status dot coverage.
- Keeps chat channel behavior covered in persistence tests.

## Moderation, Security, And Data Integrity

- Adds admin account moderation controls.
- Adds account details, recent sessions, and moderation controls to admin workflows.
- Fixes rate-limit bypass behavior under load.
- Confirms auth endpoint rate limiting for login/register.
- Adds case-insensitive character-name uniqueness per realm.
- Preserves display case for non-conflicting names.
- Cleans existing same-realm case collisions deterministically.
- Keeps the earliest character name unchanged, renames later collisions with
suffixes, and marks them `force_rename = TRUE`.
- Adds same-realm `lower(name)` uniqueness enforcement.
- Bounds and deduplicates autosaves.
- Adds CI build/test workflow.

## Performance And Infrastructure

- Bounds and dedupes autosaves.
- Serves built assets from root correctly.
- Keeps hashed media build output intact.
- Adds CI coverage for test, typecheck, env build, server build, and client build.
- Updates input tests for document-level pointer-lock and cursor behavior.

## Test And Verification Coverage

New or expanded coverage includes:

- Arena match flow, aftermath, forfeit, countdown buff, root diminishing, and
leaderboard tests.
- Fishing progression and cast cancellation tests.
- Personal quest corpse loot tests.
- Party target marker tests.
- Character-name collision cleanup and case-insensitive uniqueness tests.
- Chat alias and sticky channel tests.
- Input pointer-lock and mouse-camera related tests.
- Click-to-move tests.
- Action-bar replacement, clearing, spell dragging, and consumable shortcut tests.
- Vendor stack selling and buyback tests.
- PvP safety tests.
- Dungeon entry/spawn/targetability regression tests.
- Social status and `/who` coverage.
- Moderation/security/rate-limit test coverage.

Verified before release promotion:

- `npm test` passed: 46 test files, 529 tests.
- `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.
- `npm run build:env` passed.
- `npm run build:server` passed.
- `npm run build` passed.
- GitHub Actions CI passed on `release/v0.5` at `b1d9f28`.
- Dev deploy to `https://dev.worldofclaudecraft.com` passed health checks.
- Manual dev smoke covered login, character select, world entry, Mouse Camera,
